discordant_pairs_case_exposed.description: Number of matched pairs in which the case but not the control reported low fruit and vegetable consumption (discordant pair type b), used directly in the McNemar test statistic calculation.

discordant_pairs_control_exposed.description: Number of matched pairs in which the control but not the case reported low fruit and vegetable consumption (discordant pair type c), used directly in the McNemar test statistic calculation.
